plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: World Explorer needs your location to reveal the map as you explore.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: World Explorer needs your location to reveal the map as you explore.

plugins.cameraPermission: World Explorer needs camera access to identify animals.

plugins.photosPermission: World Explorer needs photo library access to identify animals from existing photos.
